mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.password_hash, u.email, u.phone, u.real_name, u.gender, u.birth_date, u.avatar_url, u.id_card, u.wechat_openid, u.wechat_unionid, u.account_status, u.last_login_time, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted_at, r.role_name, r.role_code FROM user u LEFT JOIN user_role_mapping urm ON u.user_id = urm.user_id LEFT JOIN user_role r ON urm.role_id = r.role_id WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.password_hash, u.email, u.phone, u.real_name, u.gender, u.birth_date, u.avatar_url, u.id_card, u.wechat_openid, u.wechat_unionid, u.account_status, u.last_login_time, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted_at, r.role_name, r.role_code FROM user u LEFT JOIN user_role_mapping urm ON u.user_id = urm.user_id LEFT JOIN user_role r ON urm.role_id = r.role_id WHERE u.phone = #{phone} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT role_id FROM user_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (user_id, username, password_hash, email, phone, real_name, gender, account_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{realName}, #{gender}, #{accountStatus}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
INSERT INTO user_role_mapping (mapping_id, user_id, role_id) VALUES (#{mappingId}, #{userId}, #{roleId})
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.password_hash, u.email, u.phone, u.real_name, u.gender, u.birth_date, u.avatar_url, u.id_card, u.wechat_openid, u.wechat_unionid, u.account_status, u.last_login_time, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted_at, r.role_name, r.role_code FROM user u LEFT JOIN user_role_mapping urm ON u.user_id = urm.user_id LEFT JOIN user_role r ON urm.role_id = r.role_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.password_hash, u.email, u.phone, u.real_name, u.gender, u.birth_date, u.avatar_url, u.id_card, u.wechat_openid, u.wechat_unionid, u.account_status, u.last_login_time, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted_at, r.role_name, r.role_code FROM user u LEFT JOIN user_role_mapping urm ON u.user_id = urm.user_id LEFT JOIN user_role r ON urm.role_id = r.role_id WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
